Boutique Tourist Accommodation West Coast

West Coast, Greymouth

NZD $1,250,000 + GST (if any)

Property details

Goldfields Suites. On offer here is a rather unique Qualmark Gold adults only boutique accommodation business, set in a lovely 2-hectare bush setting just 10 minutes' drive from Greymouth.

Aimed at the luxury market, the property provides a unique experience for the discerning traveller.

Currently operated just 6 months of the year, with many unique points of difference, potential here to expand the business or just enjoy the lifestyle.

A separate two-bedroom managers apartment completes the picture.

Make an enquiry today to start your new lifestyle.

Photo Gallery

Highlights

  • ✓Qualmark Gold adults-only accommodation experience
  • ✓2-hectare bush setting with premium positioning
  • ✓Lifestyle business with expansion potential
  • ✓Separate two-bedroom managers apartment

  • Title TypeFreehold
